---
title: "Julián Andrés Pérez Mejía"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/monguitos.png
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/St3mcell
---

*Graduate student in Biology*

[Pontificia Universidad Javeriana](https://www.javeriana.edu.co/inicio?gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=23544517129&gbraid=0AAAAAon8LWyVa6fYRos66zUji5In9Lx_2&gclid=CjwKCAjw857RBhAgEiwAI-1yKKKAGVxfQo-Semr_ghWDhnhpOzjMbqbCeQDuQLozYCd2TiZFYC9uWRoCQBwQAvD_BwE)

## Education

Biology, Pontificia Universidad Javeriana \| 2026

Recocha, Bogota´s MonguiSchool \| In process
